mapper.select: select listing_id, seller_user_id, goods_type, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from market_listing where listing_id = #{listingId, jdbcType=BINARY}

select listing_id, seller_user_id, goods_type, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from market_listing where listing_id = #{listingId, jdbcType=BINARY} for update

select listing_id, seller_user_id, goods_type, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from market_listing where seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by create_time desc, listing_id desc

select listing_id, seller_user_id, goods_type, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from market_listing where status in ('ACTIVE', 'SOLD_OUT') order by create_time desc, listing_id desc
mapper.update: update market_listing set title = #{title}, description = #{description}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, delivery_mode = #{deliveryMode}, stock_mode = #{stockMode}, min_purchase_quantity = #{minPurchaseQuantity}, max_purchase_quantity = #{maxPurchaseQuantity}, update_time = current_timestamp where listing_id = #{listingId, jdbcType=BINARY} and seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}

update market_listing set stock_total = stock_total + #{deltaTotal}, stock_available = stock_available + #{deltaAvailable}, status = #{nextStatus}, update_time = current_timestamp where listing_id = #{listingId, jdbcType=BINARY} and seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}
